optimization_analysis.optimized_query:
# Optimized Federated Query using SERVICE clauses
# Each triple pattern is pushed to its most selective endpoint

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8892/sparql/
# Predicates: 6
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/chemicalFormula> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drugs -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [4.7K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/chemicalFormula> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/vocab/resource/class/Offer -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [4.7K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/indication> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drugs -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.5K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/indication> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/vocab/resource/class/Offer -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.5K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/genericName> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drugs -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [4.8K triples]

optimized_federated_query:
# Smart Federated Query with Class Constraints
# Note: Multiple class interpretations exist but all route to same endpoints
# A single query retrieves all data regardless of class ambiguity

SELECT DISTINCT ?compound ?country ?drgBnkDrg ?drugName ?drugbcr ?formula ?gender ?indication ?patient ?popDensity ?uri
WHERE {

  SERVICE <http://localhost:8892/sparql/> {
    ?drgBnkDrg <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/indication> ?indication . # ?drgBnkDrg:drugs, ?indication:Literal
    ?drgBnkDrg <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/chemicalFormula> ?formula . # ?drgBnkDrg:drugs, ?formula:Literal
    ?drgBnkDrg <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/genericName> ?drugName . # ?drgBnkDrg:drugs, ?drugName:Literal
    ?drgBnkDrg <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/keggCompoundId> ?compound .
    ?drugbcr <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/drug_name> ?drugName .
  }

  # Unknown endpoint (no metadata)
    ?patient <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country> ?country .
    ?patient <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/bcr_drug_barcode> ?drugbcr .
    ?patient <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/gender> ?gender .
    ?uri <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/bcr_patient_barcode> ?patient .
    ?country <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/populationDensity> ?popDensity .
}
LIMIT 1000
